overview.description: The Twin Oak Active Opportunities ETF (TSPX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of equity and fixed-income securities. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation and utilizes a combination of bottom-up research and top-down analysis. TSPX was launched on Feb 20, 2025 and is issued by Twin Oak.
